aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with a clear website structure and some schema markup, but lacks reviews, citations, and comprehensive content to fully optimize for AI search.
quick_wins: Gather and display customer reviews to build trust and improve local SEO.
Expand content on services and benefits to target long-tail keywords and improve relevance.
Implement a blog or resource section to regularly publish content related to heat pump maintenance and industry trends.

found: Local service area mentioned (Greater Boston & Coastal New England)
Physical location in Jamaica Plain, Massachusetts
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has a defined local presence but lacks detailed location information and local content to strengthen its local SEO signals.
critical_issues: No Google Business Profile (GBP) found, which is crucial for local search visibility.
Lack of localized content and location-specific keywords.
No customer reviews or testimonials to build local trust and authority.

nap_citations.summary: The business has not established consistent Name, Address, and Phone Number (NAP) citations across directories, which is essential for local SEO.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile with accurate NAP information.
List the business on major local directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms, including social media and industry-specific directories.

schema_gaps: No LocalBusiness schema with detailed address and service area
No Review schema to display customer testimonials
No FAQ schema to address common customer questions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and local citations
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and voice search queries due to inadequate local SEO and GBP presence
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and creating a Google Business Profile
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publishing high-quality, locally relevant content and earning backlinks from local organizations or industry partners
